description: Multi-step wizard that guides a new user through path selection, interest choices, and a review screen before launching the app.

intent.summary: When the user asks for an onboarding wizard or multi-step setup flow, refer to the AgnosticUI Onboarding Wizard Playbook.

recipe.layout: Full-viewport single-page app. AgProgress indicator at the top tracks the current step. Center content area renders one step at a time. Persistent Back/Next navigation row at the bottom (the interstitial step replaces it with a top Back link and full-width Next button).

components.role: Step indicator showing how far through the wizard the user is
Card-grid for path selection and interest multi-select steps
Pill-button group for single-select choices (e.g. framework preference)
Back, Next, and final submit actions
Confirmation message on the review and completion step

recipe.notes:
Each step is a separate component rendered conditionally by a step index. Example AgNode for the path-selection step:
```json
{ "id": "path-group", "component": "AgSelectionCardGroup", "props": { "multiple": false }, "children": ["card-frontend", "card-backend", "card-fullstack"] }
```
